justifications.temporal_understanding: The agent correctly interpreted all of the user's time preferences throughout the conversation.
justifications.negotiation_effectiveness: The agent consistently offered to check for other times on the same day or a different day when the requested slot was unavailable.
justifications.conversational_efficiency: The agent was efficient in its responses and did not ask for information that had already been provided.
justifications.customer_experience: The agent maintained a polite and helpful tone throughout the conversation, despite multiple unavailable slots.
